text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: If I have too many sweets, I'll be too full for dinner...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: But just a little should be fine. And that means...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
If I eat this super fast, problem solved! 'Cause I'll
only be eating for a tiny little moment!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah, here we go! Turbo chow dooown!
